untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (two peaks of approximately equal height and identification of confirmation line low) requires multi-bar pattern recognition logic not expressible with single-bar indicators and basic operators. The 'confirmation line' (low between two peaks) is a structural pattern element that cannot be computed from standard OHLCV indicators without explicit peak-detection algorithms.
translation_notes: Signal requires identifying a double-top pattern with two equal peaks and computing the low between them as a dynamic support level. This is a chart pattern recognition task beyond the scope of indicator-based rules. The entry condition 'close below confirmation line' was approximated using pivot point as a proxy, but this is NOT semantically equivalent to the actual pattern. Recommend implementing a custom pattern detector or using candle pattern library instead.
